title: Developing a Multilingual Chatbot for Customer Support
scenario: Create a conversational agent that can provide customer support in multiple languages. The agent should be able to understand user input in different languages and provide clear and concise responses. Ensure the agent's responses are concise and within a 50-word limit.
constraints: Must understand user input in different languages

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the conversational agent understand user input in different languages?
Are the agent's responses clear and concise?
Does the prompt adhere to the constraint of being under 50 words?
